title: TEST: Coppie simili
description: Due scene ambientate in portali di pietra quasi identici (loc_black_gate vs loc_helgedad_gate): verifica se la descrizione nel dizionario basta a distinguerli.

scenes.narrativeText: Deep in the forest you find it: a dark stone gate flanked by two skull-horned guardian statues, their empty eyes fixed on the path. Beyond the threshold, a staircase descends into darkness.
The stairs end at another archway entirely, this one guarded by two horned warriors carved in stone, runes cut deep above the lintel. Stairs beyond lead down into a passage lit by some unseen source.
The passage ends in a bare chamber, empty and silent. Whatever once was here is long gone.
